summary: Gangdong went DPK in both subs (진선미 갑 51.50, 이해식 을 54.54). 갑's narrow margin was nearly identical to 2024 (50.12%) — Gangdong is a stable but not dominant DPK gu.

issues.label: Pro-Moon wave (modest)
issues.description: Margin only modestly above 50%; suggests structural rather than wave-driven outcome.
